summary: Day Trading Execution Fix (P0) fully verified. The ConfidenceScoringEngine.score_day_trade() fix is working correctly - 102 of 168 signals now pass the 61 confidence threshold (was 0 before the fix). All 7 scoring components are present and utilized. The verifier watcher bug (MarketSessionManager._now_et) is fixed - no errors after 05:56 UTC restart. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly with trading signals and investment ideas.

frontend_tests.trading_signals_visible: PASS - Hot Trading Signals section shows LITE, VIAV, JHG, PFE with Strong Buy signals
frontend_tests.investment_ideas_visible: PASS - Top Investment Ideas shows TSM (89), INCY (87), EXEL (86), HCI (86)

verifier_watcher_fix.before_fix: Errors every 90 seconds: 'Verifier watcher error: type object MarketSessionManager has no attribute _now_et'
verifier_watcher_fix.after_fix: No errors after 05:56 UTC restart - fix confirmed working

features_verified: P0: /api/execution/diagnostics returns valid score breakdowns with dt_classified=168, passing_threshold=102
P0: component_utilization has all 7 components (technical_setup, volume, sentiment, risk_reward, trend_alignment, volatility, market_regime)
P0: ConfidenceScoringEngine.score_day_trade() with return_breakdown=True returns both score and breakdown dict with all 7 component keys
P0: passing_threshold=102 (was 0 before the fix) - signals now PASSING the 61 confidence threshold
P0: /api/execution/rejection-report returns valid response with 18 rejection categories
P1: No 'Verifier watcher error' or 'MarketSessionManager._now_et' errors after 05:56 UTC restart
P1: /api/trading/scan returns day trade candidates with proper structure
P1: /api/scheduler/status returns valid status (running, paper mode, market closed)
Frontend: Dashboard loads correctly with trading signals and investment ideas after login

key_fix_verification.issue: Day Trading execution bottleneck - 0 day trades executing during live sessions
key_fix_verification.root_cause: ConfidenceScoringEngine.score_day_trade() was scoring against fields that didn't exist in stored signals (confluence_factors vs confluence_score, missing rr_ratio, news_sentiment format mismatch)
key_fix_verification.fix_applied: Recalibrated score_day_trade() to use actual available fields: confluence_score, volume_ratio, atr_pct, change_pct, price_vs_50ma/200ma, 52_week_position, structure_type, calculated rr_ratio from stop_loss/take_profit/price

critical_code_review_comments: ConfidenceScoringEngine.score_day_trade() now correctly uses actual available fields from stored signals
R:R ratio is calculated from signal-level stop_loss/take_profit/price when not in indicators
news_sentiment handles both dict format (composite_score) and string format (positive/neutral/negative)
All 7 scoring components are properly weighted and utilized
Verifier watcher now uses module-level _now_et() instead of MarketSessionManager._now_et()
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing trading signals from MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: Day Trading Execution Fix (P0) fully verified.
